message:
Merge pull request #373 from steveyegge/dependabot/go_modules/github.com/anthropics/anthropic-sdk-go-1.18.1

Bump github.com/anthropics/anthropic-sdk-go from 1.18.0 to 1.18.1

files.patch:
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@ go 1.24.0
 toolchain go1.24.2
 
 require (
-	github.com/anthropics/anthropic-sdk-go v1.18.0
+	github.com/anthropics/anthropic-sdk-go v1.18.1
 	github.com/fatih/color v1.18.0
 	github.com/fsnotify/fsnotify v1.9.0
 	github.com/google/go-cmp v0.7.0
